query:
SELECT 'projects' as tabela, COUNT(*) as registros FROM projects
UNION ALL SELECT 'questionnaireAnswersV3', COUNT(*) FROM questionnaireAnswersV3
UNION ALL SELECT 'questionnaireProgressV3', COUNT(*) FROM questionnaireProgressV3
UNION ALL SELECT 'projectParticipants', COUNT(*) FROM projectParticipants
UNION ALL SELECT 'briefings', COUNT(*) FROM briefings
UNION ALL SELECT 'briefingVersions', COUNT(*) FROM briefingVersions
UNION ALL SELECT 'actionPlans', COUNT(*) FROM actionPlans
UNION ALL SELECT 'actionPlanVersions', COUNT(*) FROM actionPlanVersions
UNION ALL SELECT 'riskMatrix', COUNT(*) FROM riskMatrix
UNION ALL SELECT 'sessions', COUNT(*) FROM sessions
UNION ALL SELECT 'assessmentPhase1', COUNT(*) FROM assessmentPhase1
UNION ALL SELECT 'assessmentPhase2', COUNT(*) FROM assessmentPhase2
UNION ALL SELECT 'clientMembers', COUNT(*) FROM clientMembers
UNION ALL SELECT 'auditLog', COUNT(*) FROM auditLog
UNION ALL SELECT 'notifications', COUNT(*) FROM notifications
UNION ALL SELECT 'cosoControls', COUNT(*) FROM cosoControls
UNION ALL SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users;
